stories.title: Chargeback escalation with payments vendor
stories.summary: Conflict story: chargeback escalation with payments vendor. Vendor refused to refund 1.4% of disputed charges; I led a tripartite call with finance and the vendor's risk team and recovered 91% of the disputed amount.
stories.outcome: Recovered 91% of $48k disputed; renegotiated contract clause.

stories.title: Scaled Natively to 10k users
stories.summary: Led infra rework when the live transcript pipeline started dropping audio at >3 concurrent meetings per host.
